import sys

def solve():
    import sys
    input_data = sys.stdin
    n = int(input())
    p = [0] * (n + 1)
    remaining = set(range(1, n+1))
    
    for i in range(1, n+1):
        if len(remaining) == 1:
            p[i] = next(iter(remaining))
            break
        # Binary search for p[i]

        # Set a[j] = 1 for j > i
        # s[j] = 2*p[j] for j<i, s[i]=p[i]+x, s[j]=p[j]+1 for j>i
        # Want s[i] to collide with s[j] for j<i: p[i]+x = 2*p[j] => x = 2*p[j]-p[i]
        # Try x = 2*1 = 2 (guess p[j]=1): if answer is i, then p[i]+2 = 2*p[j] for some j<i
